title: Butterflies
description: The Pack That Replaces Bees With Butterflies
body:
![Butterflies Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/butterflies/logo.webp)
## A pack to replace bees with butterflies
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/butterflies)




This pack replaces the Minecraft Bee mob with Butterflies!
